features: Gently cleanses delicate skin, leaving it feeling soft
No parabens, no sulphates, no alcohol
description: Product Description When a baby is born, their skin is at its most delicate. That’s why we perfected our formulas over 125 years so they’re now even more gentle for all. Our JOHNSON’S® Baby Honey Soap is enriched with honey extract and gently cleanses delicate skin, leaving it feeling soft and healthy. Honey Soap contains 98% naturally-derived and biodegradable ingredients, and provides the same number of washes as 2x 500ml bottles. Great for kids and adults too! Ingredients [Pr-0003218], Sodium Palmate, Sodium Palm Kernelate, Aqua, Honey, Glycerin, Paraffinum Liquidum, Palm Kernel Acid, Sodium Chloride, Tetrasodium Edta, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Disodium Edta, Parfum
